# IK Foam Pro 2+ (2 Plus) Hand Pump Sprayer

Rating: 4.7 out of 5 stars (3 Reviews)

Price: $109.95 AUD (Tax included)

Product Images:
![image](//www.detailstore.com.au/cdn/shop/products/IKFoamPro2_2Plus_HandPumpSprayer.jpg?v=1662005340&width=600)
![image](//www.detailstore.com.au/cdn/shop/products/IKFoamPro2_2Plus_HandPumpSprayer02.jpg?v=1662005575&width=600)
![image](//www.detailstore.com.au/cdn/shop/products/IKFoamPro2_2Plus_HandPumpSprayer03.jpg?v=1662005653&width=600)
![image](//www.detailstore.com.au/cdn/shop/files/Table_1_b7143575-afdd-4415-9e22-b91ba47d607e.png?v=1701824100&width=600)
![image](//www.detailstore.com.au/cdn/shop/files/Table_2_8023db2c-003e-4e67-863d-ed912a9fd0db.png?v=1701824100&width=600)

The Detail Store is proud to carry some of the finest pump action Professional Multi-Purpose and Foam Compression Sprayers available anywhere in the world. For over 60 years, the Goizper Group has been designing and manufacturing high-quality sprayers for the Automotive, Industrial, Janitorial, and Construction sectors from their state-of-the-art European facilities, developing a reputation as a true leader in the industry.

The IK Foam Pro 2+ has the built-in Schrader Air Valve, but the IK Foam Pro 2 does NOT.

iK Foam Pro 2+ includes a Schrader Valve for super fast fills using your air compressor!

IK Foam Pro 2+ Sprayers are specifically manufactured for the generation of dry and long lasting foam. Designed for use with chemical agents with surfactant properties (surface active). IK FOAM creates a groundbreaking and satisfying experience. Thanks to its precision and design you will be able to generate the foam that best suits your needs.

- Self-Contained with Everything You'll Need to Get Spraying Right Away - Save Money, Pressure Washer Needed!
- All IK Sprayers Are Equipped With the Highest Quality FPM, Viton Seals and Washers
- All IK Polypropylene and Polyethylene Tanks are Heavy Duty Injection Molded
- Wider Mouth and Funnel Opening Create An Easy Filling Process and Easy Cleaning Process
- All IK Hoses are Made of Strong PVC with the Perfect Amount of Flexibility
- All IK Sprayers Come with Pressure Relief Safety Valves

Features:
- Can be hand pumped or filled with compressed air
- Translucent tank with level indicator
- Base for greater stability
- Large opening easy filling
- Safety lock
- Safety valve with depressurization option
- Protective sleeve for valve chamber
- Ability to identify content via coloured caps
- Option of fitting other types of nozzles and accessories
- Easy assembly and taking apart for cleaning and maintenance, tool-free

Please note to check compatibility of the intended chemical usage against the chart below.
![image](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/2670/1362/files/Table_1_480x480.png?v=1701823934)
![image](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/2670/1362/files/Table_2_480x480.png?v=1701823949)

## Reviews (3)

100% would recommend this product

Griffin D. C. (Verified Buyer) - Rated 5 out of 5 stars - 16 hours ago:
"Excellent value. Versatile application"
I've known for some time that this is a well reviewed product and that it would likely have a time saving application for my business. It does. It works consistently well and it can be used with a range of products to effective degrees. It is only plastic, which I suspect will perish over time, and that sucks to be so wasteful eventually, but for the next few years between remote detailing and eventually an overhead space, it's awesome.

Michael N. (Verified Buyer) - Rated 4 out of 5 stars - 2 months ago:
"Foamer"
Works very well with diy detail all clean

Elliot - Rated 5 out of 5 stars - 9 months ago:
"5 Stars"
Awesome foam! Exactly what i wanted. I used the default purple-ish nozzel, perfect thickness. By the way, consider the cannon a way to exercise, because you may have to repump few times. But hey, all for good cause!

sources.page_title: Adam's iK E Foam Pro 2 Sprayer
sources.cleaned_content:
# Adam's iK E Foam Pro 2 Sprayer

Price: $119.99

Product Images:
![image](//adamspolishes.com/cdn/shop/files/adams_polishes_ik_efoam_pro_2.0.jpg?v=1745972487&width=4370)
![image](//adamspolishes.com/cdn/shop/files/adams_polishes_ik_efoam_pro_2.0_SS-1.jpg?v=1745972494&width=1506)
![image](//adamspolishes.com/cdn/shop/files/adams_polishes_ik_efoam_pro_2.0_SS-2.jpg?v=1745972495&width=2662)
![image](//adamspolishes.com/cdn/shop/files/adams_polishes_ik_efoam_pro_2.0_SS-3.jpg?v=1745972495&width=4083)

Not Eligible For Discounts

Say goodbye to manual pumping and hello to convenience with the iK E Foam Pro 2 - the ultimate electric foam sprayer designed for professional and enthusiast detailers. Built on the trusted platform of the IK Foam Pro 2, this upgraded model features an integrated rechargeable battery-powered compressor that delivers continuous pressure at up to 43.5 psi with no manual effort required.

- Cordless & Battery Operated
- Rechargeable - 8 to 10 Tanks Before Recharging
- Quick & Easy One Touch Power Button
- Builds Up To 43.5 PSI In Pressure
- Produces Thick And Clingy Foam
- Optimal For Water Saving Mobile Detailing

## Description

With just a 3-second hold of the power button, the IK e Foam Pro 2 activates and begins building pressure with a simple tap. Once pressurized, pull the trigger to unleash a steady, rich stream of foam that stays consistent until the tank is empty. It's the ideal solution for creating thick, clinging foam quickly - perfect for car shampoos, paint pre-treatment, wheel cleaning and general detailing chemistries.

Whether you're a mobile detailer, working in an area with water restrictions, or don't have access to a pressure washer or foam cannon, this battery-operated foam sprayer offers the ultimate in portability and performance. Just add your favorite car shampoo or chemical solution and experience fast, even coverage without the hassle of hand-pumping. The iK E Foam Pro 2 transforms your detailing workflow, making it easier, faster, and more efficient than ever before.

## Other Specifications

- Maximum Pressure: 43.5 psi
- Gross weight (empty): 1.23 lbs
- Total capacity: 64 oz (1.9 L)
- Battery: 7.4v 3200mAh
- Includes 3 Color-Coded Mixer Adaptors! Your choice of dry, wet, or standard foam.
  - Orange: Watery or Wet Foam
  - Green: More Dry Foam
  - Grey: Standard Foam

Please refer to the manual for instructional use, as well as cleaning and maintenance.

![image](//adamspolishes.com/cdn/shop/files/Adams_Polishes_2025_iK_eFoamPro2_BB-1_e311cdcc-5bbd-496a-b10b-63d915e56b70.jpg?v=1745974832&width=1700)

Take Your Pick In Chemistry - Whether you are cleaning wheels & tires, or using a car shampoo you are ready to go anywhere.

![image](//adamspolishes.com/cdn/shop/files/Adams_Polishes_2025_iK_eFoamPro2_BB-2_916cb4b5-dc41-490c-afd1-08a0c3f4e71f.jpg?v=1745974849&width=1700)

Easy On & Off - Just hold the button down for 3 seconds and you are ready to foam whatever you need in seconds.

![image](//adamspolishes.com/cdn/shop/files/Adams_Polishes_2025_iK_eFoamPro2_BB-3_509f5b30-4e88-4b32-8c28-2c2157ee9db0.jpg?v=1745974861&width=1700)

Make Your Detailing Process Easier - Works great to create a thick foam for wheel and tire cleaning.

Tested for Performance - All of our products undergo rigorous testing through in house verification & third parties.
Quality Materials - Our chemicals are blended here in the USA with the most premium raw materials from around the world.
New Standards for Car Care - At Adam's we make sure we are always pushing the limits of car care.
Satisfaction Guaranteed - If you are not incredibly satisfied with an Adam's product, we will refund your purchase, plus 10%.

# IK FOAM Pro 2+ Foaming 1.5L Sprayer

Product Images:
![image](https://cdn11.bigcommerce.com/s-e27d9/images/stencil/1280x1280/products/1928/7536/81678-0__38692.1740060843.jpg?c=2)
![image](https://cdn11.bigcommerce.com/s-e27d9/images/stencil/1280x1280/products/1928/7537/81678-2__30024.1661264498.jpg?c=2)
![image](https://cdn11.bigcommerce.com/s-e27d9/images/stencil/1280x1280/products/1928/7538/81678-3__60387.1661264570.jpg?c=2)
![image](https://cdn11.bigcommerce.com/s-e27d9/images/stencil/1280x1280/products/1928/7539/81678-4__21435.1661868269.jpg?c=2)

Our Price: $55.99
Brand: IK Sprayers
SKU: 81678
UPC: 84146852102188
Availability: Usually ships within 12 hours
Step: Clean
Size: 64oz | 1.89 Liter
Arrival: 2022
Tech: Foaming Pump Sprayer
Tech: pH 1-11

# IK Foam Pro 2+ Sprayer 64 oz

No longer do you need a pressure washer to foam your vehicle; all you need is the IK Foam Sprayers! These sprayers were specifically manufactured for foaming and cleaning applications and can be used with a wide variety of cleaning formulas.

The IK Foam Pro 2+ sprayer provides the user a dense and durable foam suitable for cleaning and disinfecting upholstery and carpets and foaming the exterior of your vehicle. In a particularly advantageous way, the Foam Pro 2+ sprayer has a compressed air connector, an inlet valve located in the sprayer head that allows the insertion of air into the tank thanks to its universal Schrader valve for connectors worldwide.

Designed for use with chemical agents with surfactant properties (surface active). Dilute your favorite APC, car wash soap, or iron remover depending on the task at hand. Provided with the sprayer are 3 color coded adaptors for different types of foam production (dry, wet, or standard foam).

### Features:
- Resistant to most acids and solvents (pH 1-11, Check Chemical Product Table).
- 3 bar safety valve with depressurization option.
- Large opening for easy filling and cleaning.
- Innovative and ergonomic design.
- Strong translucent tank with level indicator.
- Base for greater stability.
- Safety lock.
- Protective sleeve for valve chamber.
- Compressed air connector for easy pressurizing.
- Easy assembly and taking apart for cleaning and maintenance, tool free.
- Special foam even fan type nozzle.
- Color coded caps included to identify contents of sprayer and for nozzle storage.
- Comes with three (3) Color-Coded Mixer Adaptors! Creates your choice of dry, wet, OR standard foam.
  - Orange: Very wet foam
  - Green: Very dry foam
  - Grey: Standard foam

### Specifications:
- Maximum pressure: 3 bar 43.5 psi
- Net weight: 1.54 lb
- Gross weight: 1.23 lb
- Useful capacity: 42 oz (1.25 L)
- Total capacity: 64 oz (1.9 L)

### Can be used with products such as:
- CARPRO Reset
- CARPRO Descale
- CARPRO Hydro2 Foam
- CARPRO MultiX - Limited
- CARPRO Lift - Limited
- CARPRO Cleanse
- CARPRO Inside - Limited
- CARPRO IronX Snow Soap - Limited
- CARPRO Spotless - Limited
- Koch Chemie Gentle Snow Foam
- Koch Chemie Green Star - Limited
- Koch Chemie Pol Star - Limited
- Oberk All Purpose Soap - Limited
- Oberk Foam Wash
- OBSSSSD Auto Wash
- Ultima Paint Guard Wash
- Car Candy Bubblicious
- Car Candy Revive
- Dr. Beasley's Matte Body Wash
- BioWorx Natural Auto Soap

### Not for use with products such as:
- CARPRO Retyre (Recommended foaming sprayer: IK Alkaline Foam Pro 2, IK Alkaline Foam Pro 12, CARPRO ReTyre EMPTY 500ml Bottle or SOLO CLEANLine Alkaline Foaming Sprayer)
- CARPRO Bug-Out (Recommended sprayer: IK Multi TR 1 or IK Alkaline)
- CARPRO TarX (Recommended sprayer: IK HC TR 1 Heavy Duty Sprayer 35 oz)
- CARPRO Trix (Recommended sprayer: IK HC TR 1 Heavy Duty Sprayer 35 oz)

### Instructions:
- Unscrew the sprayer head by turning it anti-clockwise.
- Fill the tank with water to the indicated maximum of 1,25L 42 oz.
- Pour the foaming product.
- Screw tightly to close.
- Pressurize the device using strokes (approx. 15). For a good quality foam it is important to pressurize until the valve clicks or pops out.
- To begin spraying, make sure the safety lock is off. Press the handle and, as you work, compensate for the loss in pressure by making more passes.
- Once the work is finished, activate the safety lock and release the pressure by pulling the safety valve.
- If more than one appliance is used with different chemicals, use the identification marker to identify the contents of each appliance by placing it on the end of the handle. To remove it, pull it in the direction shown by the arrows using a tool or pointed instrument.

### Cleaning and Maintenance:
- After each use, depressurize the sprayer.
- Collect and dispose of the residual amount according to the legislation, prescriptions, and applicable regulations.
- Clean the appliance with water.
- In the event of obstruction of the nozzle, clean it with water and do not use metallic objects.
- In order to prolong the life of the joints, regularly apply some drops of oil or grease on the moving parts.
- To access the valve chamber, remove the cylinder guard by pulling it firmly.

### Video: IK FOAM Pro 2 + (EN)
Pumping days are over!

THE RAG COMPANY is proud to offer some of the finest pump-action, professional multi-purpose and foam compression sprayers available worldwide.

For over 60 years, the Goizper Group has been at the forefront of sprayer innovation, designing and manufacturing top-tier products from their state-of-the-art European facilities. Serving the Automotive, Industrial, Janitorial, and Construction sectors, Goizper has built a global reputation for excellence.

The iK line of professional sprayers is the result of decades of engineering expertise and a commitment to quality, backed by ISO-9001:2008 certification for Total Quality Management. These sprayers embody superior craftsmanship and performance standards that clearly set them apart from the competition - you'll notice the difference from the very first use.

### Product Features
- 50 oz. Useful Capacity
- Strong Translucent Tank with Indicator Level
- 45 PSI Safety Valve with Depressurization Option
- Can Be Hand Pumped or Filled with Compressed Air
- Ergonomic Design
- Protective Sleeve for Chamber Valve
- Easy Assembly and Dismantling for Maintenance, Without Tools
- Possible Adaptation to Other Types of Nozzles and Accessories
- Suitable for Acids, Alcohols, Hydro Carbons and Oils

![image](//theragcompany.com/cdn/shop/files/ik-foam-pro-2_-chevrolet-suburban-demo-11-web.jpg?v=1708984709&width=300)
![image](//theragcompany.com/cdn/shop/files/ik-foam-pro-2_-schrader-valve-demo-1-web.jpg?v=1708984713&width=300)

## Reviews (7)

Haskell S. A. (Verified Buyer) - Rated 5 out of 5 stars - 1 week ago:
"Good foamer"
It works great. Just make sure you don't fill with too much liquid and it's also nice to have something like a tire inflator to take advantage of the shrader valve.

Cesar A. (Verified Buyer) - Rated 1 out of 5 stars - 1 month ago:
"Definitely not what I expected"
The thick foam is great, the way it just chugs the contents is crazy and without a compressor don't see this being very useful

William D. (Verified Buyer) - Rated 4 out of 5 stars - 3 months ago:
"Ik foam sprayer"
This sprayer is perfect for wheels and lower section of the vehicle for an extra bit of foam. Does need to be pumped by hand a lot to build the best pressure. Other than that it's amazing

Victor O. (Verified Buyer) - Rated 5 out of 5 stars - 4 months ago:
"Super Handy"
Love this thing, have to pump it a little more often but works awesome and can get my car done in a couple passes

sources.page_title: IK FOAM Pro 2 - Profesional Sprayers - Foam Sprayers
sources.cleaned_content:
# Foam Sprayer IK FOAM Pro 2

The IK FOAM Pro 2 professional sprayer has been manufactured for the generation of dry and durable foam. Designed to be used with chemical agents with surfactant properties.

IK Foam Pro 2 provides the user with a dense, permanent foam that is ideal for professional cleaning, sanitation and disinfection work, HVAC system cleaning, vehicle washing and detailing, bike cleaning as well as for the disinfection of food processing areas and industrial kitchens.

HOW TO MAKE A PERFECT FOAM:
- Follow the dilution ratio recommended by the foaming agent you are using.
- Pressurize the sprayer until the safety valve pops out.
- Make sure the felts are clean.

![image](https://images.goizper.com/big/default/81676/81676-0.jpg)

Reference IK FOAM Pro 2: 81676

Sectors in which to use IK FOAM Pro 2: Cleaning and disinfection, Automotive and detailing

Products with which to use IK FOAM Pro 2: optimal - Foaming agents.

## Functional Information
- Translucent tank with level indicator
- Base for greater stability
- Large opening easy filling
- Safety lock
- Safety valve with depressurisation option
- Protective sleeve for valve chamber
- Ability to identify content via coloured caps
- Easy assembly and taking apart for cleaning and maintenance, tool free

### Scope of use
![image](https://images.goizper.com/original/en/81676/81676-1.jpg)
![image](https://images.goizper.com/original/default/81676/81676-2.jpg)
![image](https://images.goizper.com/original/default/81676/81676-3.jpg)
![image](https://images.goizper.com/original/default/81676/81676-4.jpg)
![image](https://images.goizper.com/original/default/81676/81676-5.jpg)
![image](https://images.goizper.com/original/default/81676/81676-6.jpg)
![image](https://images.goizper.com/original/default/81676/81676-7.jpg)

### Technical Information
| Valve | Tared at 3 bar / 43,5 psi despresurizable |
| Standard nozzles | Special nozzle with fan-type foam |
| Useful capacity | 1,25 L - 42 Oz. |
| Total capacity | 1,9 L - 64 Oz. |
| Gross weight | 0,7 kg - 1,54 lbs. |
| Net weight | 0,56 kg - 1,23 lbs. |

Maintenance rules | Chemical product table
Instructions PDF: https://static.iksprayers.com/media/handbooks/iksprayers/en/81676.pdf
Catalog PDF: https://static.iksprayers.com/media/catalogdownload/iksprayers/en/81676.pdf

## IK FOAM Pro 2 professional spraying

The IK FOAM Pro 2 handheld sprayer is a foam generator designed for cleaning tasks in various sectors.

It has a wide filling mouth, ergonomic design, safety valve set at 3 bar (depressurisable), base for greater stability, coloured caps to identify the contents of the tank, safety lock on the opening and closing system.

The sprayer is equipped with three mixers (orange, grey and green) which allow to vary the type of foam by choosing between wet, intermediate or dry foam.

With the use of the foam we manage to increase the contact time between the chemical and the surface to be cleaned, cleaning fabrics and upholstery avoiding excessive soaking which generates the appearance of fungus and bacteria, and finally having greater visual control of the sprayed surface.

The easy manual assembly and disassembly of the IK Foam Pro 2, allows a complete maintenance without the use of tools.

![image](https://static.iksprayers.com/media/magicproduct/img-bm-ik-foam-pro-2.png)

### Accessories
- Content identifier IK 1,5/2
  ![image](https://images.goizper.com/thumbnail/default/81671900/81671900-0.jpg)
- Ik Pro lid
  ![image](https://images.goizper.com/thumbnail/default/81671901/81671901-0.jpg)
